approach: audit the corpus against the current governances before repairing anything, and report the findings at the spec gate
repair only confirmed contract gaps; restructure nothing that already conforms and invent no new spec content
treat provenance records as read-only: audit ledger, combat-log, and plan-brief format drift and report it, never retrofit a past record to a newer contract
surface the pending unratified strategy recommendations for the Council rather than ratifying or deleting them
